_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill to associate Intelligence gaps to priority information requirements and observables.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, translating business priorities into data and AI capability requirements with measurable outcomes.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-A-001 (AI, cosine: 0.521), AG-K-004 (AG, cosine: 0.488).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.9/10 (raw 0.687). Shared vocabulary: [requirements, skill]. DCWF-only terms [associate, gaps, information, intelligence, observables, priority] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, aligning, business, capability, data, measurable] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.894, R=0.872). P exceeds R by 0.022 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 23 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (84.8%). The model interprets "Skill to associate Intelligence gaps to priority information requirements and ob" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in aligning data and AI program objectives to organizational strategy, tra" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Superset of' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.572 < STS 0.687 (gap -0.115). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [associate, gaps, information] and [ai, aligning, business] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 15.4%. Shared tokens: [requirements, skill]. DCWF-only: [associate, gaps, information, intelligence, observables, priority]. WIDAI-only: [ai, aligning, business, capability, data, measurable].
